content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

February 1, 2006

Phil Baldwin
627 Willow Avenue
Ukiah, CA 95482

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-254

Dear Mr. Baldwin:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your December 13, 2005, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ as you requested on January 11, 2006. Consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Christopher Espinosa
Executive Fellow, Legal Division

CJE:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\05-254

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
